title: Spiced Indian Lentil Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired lentil stew made with a blend of spices and served with a side of naan or rice.

ingredients.name: Indian spices
ingredients.notes: Blend of cumin, coriander, and turmeric

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add onion, ginger, and Indian spices; sauté until onion is translucent.
Add lentils, curry powder, salt, and water; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
If using glazed carrots, add them to the tagine and simmer for another 5 minutes.
Serve hot with naan or rice.
